contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: Designed Telegram attention-watchdog follow-up after June 12 coordination miss
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/300
  
  Details:
  A cacao serving scheduled for June 12 was cancelled because a time-sensitive Telegram coordination message went unanswered — the reply-latency instrumentation shipped 2026-06-05 covers Gmail only. Assessed Telegram coverage options (Sophia bot: no DM visibility; Chat Logs GAS compilation: DAO groups only; MTProto user-session: full account visibility) and filed a scoped OPEN_FOLLOWUPS design for a minimal read-only Telethon watcher on the autopilot box: heuristic awaiting-Gary detection (DM/mention/reply plus question or date pattern), self-DM nudges with deadline-aware escalation, daily digest, hard cap of one nudge per chat per day, no LLM and no auto-replies so message content never leaves the box. Documented the session-custody and ToS caveats; blocked on operator one-time interactive Telegram login.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 25.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
